title: More Strongholds
description: More Strongholds increases the number of naturally-generated Strongholds in your world by changing the Stronghold structure set placement!
body:
![More Strongholds by DarkhawkJP99](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2fe5ec8c131aa2c4264cf7ac1947db13c17f50b.png)

# More Strongholds

**More Strongholds** increases the number of naturally generated Strongholds in your world by modifying the Stronghold structure set placement.

Unlike vanilla’s ring-based distribution, this datapack uses **random spread placement**, allowing Strongholds to generate naturally throughout the world rather than forming concentric bands around spawn.

The result is a world with **more Strongholds than vanilla**, evenly distributed and spaced to avoid excessive overlap or underground clutter.

---

## Features

* Uses **random spread** placement instead of concentric rings
* Generates more Strongholds than vanilla
* Balanced spacing to reduce structure overlap
* Designed to preserve reliable portal room generation
* Affects **newly generated chunks only**

Existing chunks will not retroactively gain new Strongholds.

---

## Compatibility

This datapack modifies only the Stronghold structure set.

Any datapack or mod that also edits the Stronghold structure set may conflict.

For best results, use on a **new world**, or explore into newly generated terrain to see the changes.

---

## Configuration

All placement values are defined in the Stronghold structure set JSON file included in the pack.

If you prefer a different density or distribution style, you can adjust the placement values to suit your world.
